title: Citrusy Flaky Lemon Stir-fry
description: A one-pot paleo-friendly Slovakian dish featuring citrusy lemons and a flaky texture, perfect for breakfast.
instructions: Wash and chop zucchini into thin slices.
In a large pan, heat almond flour until it forms a thick crust on the bottom of the pan (about 2 minutes).
Add lemon juice to the hot flour base, stirring continuously until the mixture starts to thicken slightly but not fully cooked.
Reduce heat and add zucchini slices. Cook for about 3-4 minutes or until they start turning golden brown.
Toss in chopped spinach and stir well to combine. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if needed.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh lemon zest.
